source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: The Grinder
archetype.receipt: 1,157 games of steady volume at 50.6% — the climb is about where the games go, not how many.

entries.change: Move your offlane games to support

entries.receipt: 52.2% over 165 games on Zinx vs 50.6% overall

entries.change: Queue support instead of your average mix
entries.receipt: 51.1% there vs 50.6% overall, 335 games of evidence

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

pool.name: Gadget
pool.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime: first spike lands around minute 12 (Wraith Leggings), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +11.7% on this kit’s main output at minute 15.

plan: Keep queueing support as primary — it is already your usual queue AND your best role at 51.1% over 335 games (your overall is 50.6%).
Your champion pool is 11+ heroes wide and your top three are only 47% of your games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on your top three.
The math: you are at 640 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. Your all-time peak is 903 — you have already touched Platinum-level rating once; this is a consistency problem, not a ceiling problem.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward your own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where you win, not why

insights.title: Gadget is the long-term relationship
insights.finding: 222 games and you genuinely out-pilot the field on Gadget — about 2.0 more wins per 100 games than the average Gadget player. The hours show.

insights.title: Mr_Meat31 brings out your best
insights.finding: Your record alongside Mr_Meat31 is 54% over 302 ranked games — your strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of you queue, make it this one.

insights.title: For the group chat
insights.finding: 1 pentakill in real 5v5s and a longest spree of 18 (plus 1 more in ARAM and brawls — the group chat can rule on whether those count). Willy has receipts.

insights.title: Your lean, relative to the squad: objective damage
insights.finding: Willy's profile sits mid-pack on most axes; the clearest lean is objective damage at 0.8x the squad average. Steady is a style too — the lineup can build around predictability.
